name: Input Handler
description: Centralized input processing with support for multiple input schemes and rebinding

is_action_pressed.description: Map of action names to pressed state

signals.input_scheme_changed: Emitted when input device changes (String scheme)
signals.action_pressed: Emitted when any registered action is pressed (String action)
signals.action_released: Emitted when any registered action is released (String action)

methods.get_movement_vector: Returns Vector2 of current movement input
methods.is_action_just_pressed: Check if action was just pressed (String action) -> bool
methods.is_action_pressed: Check if action is held (String action) -> bool
methods.rebind_action: Rebind an action to new key (String action, InputEvent event)
